# Nikola Miljković — AI-Powered Web Developer

> Nikola Miljković is a freelance web developer based in Niš, Serbia, specializing in AI-enhanced web development workflows. He builds pixel-perfect websites using modern frameworks like Astro and Webflow, with a focus on clean code, strong foundations, and seamless interactions.

## Services
- Full website builds (multi-page sites with CMS, animations, custom features)
- Website redesigns
- Landing pages
- Webflow development
- Ongoing site optimization and support

## Key Facts
- Based in: Niš, Serbia (CET timezone)
- Available for: Remote work worldwide
- Typical project timeline: 1–3 weeks
- Post-launch support: 30 days free included with every project
- Tech stack: Astro, Webflow, JavaScript, CSS, GSAP, AI-enhanced workflows

## Contact
- Website: https://www.nikolamiljkovic.live
- Email: n.miljkovic1987@outlook.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/nikola-miljkovic-542456108/
- Behance: https://www.behance.net/nikolamiljkovic5
- Dribbble: https://dribbble.com/nikola-miljkovic

## FAQ
Q: What services does Nikola Miljković offer?
A: He specializes in developing high-quality websites using AI-enhanced workflows and modern frameworks like Astro, including full site builds, redesigns, landing pages, and ongoing site optimization.

Q: How long does a typical project take?
A: A typical project takes 1 to 3 weeks. Smaller landing pages can be finished in a few days, while full multi-page websites with CMS, animations, and custom features usually require 2–3 weeks.

Q: Does Nikola offer ongoing support after project completion?
A: Yes. Every project includes 30 days of free post-launch support for small adjustments, troubleshooting, and ensuring everything runs smoothly.

Q: How do I get started working with Nikola?
A: Send a short overview of your project via the contact form at nikolamiljkovic.live/contact. He'll follow up with details needed, then prepare a proposal and timeline.
